goal: Open Wikipedia and search for the Eiffel Tower.
Go to a news site and search for today's weather forecast.
Fill in a contact form with a name and an email, then pause before submitting.
Open a forum, find the pinned thread, and scroll down to read it.
Go to an online store, search for wireless headphones, and open the first result.
Open a recipe site, search for banana bread, and scroll to the ingredients list.
Go to a job board, search for remote python developer, and open the first listing.
Fill in a newsletter signup form with an email address, then pause before submitting.
Open a documentation site, search for getting started, and open the matching page.
Go to a weather site, scroll down to the 5-day forecast, then pause to note it down.
Open a forum, search for the welcome thread, open it, and scroll to the bottom.
Go to a travel booking site, fill in a destination field with Lisbon, then pause before choosing dates.
Open a library catalog, search for a book title, and open the first matching result.
Go to a support site, search for reset password, and open the top article.
Fill in a login form with a username, then pause before entering the password.
Open a video site, search for a beginner guitar lesson, and open the first video.
Go to a map site, search for a nearby coffee shop, then pause to pick one.
Open an online checkout page, review the cart, then pause before clicking pay.
Go to a search engine, search for best budget laptops 2026, and open the third result.
Go to an online store product page, choose a size from a dropdown, then pause before adding to cart.
